incorrect.source_says: Lung stem/progenitor cells (LSPCs) isolated from neonatal mouse peripheral lung tissue (primary tissue), not adult stem cells
incorrect.evidence_quote: Lung tissues were obtained from neonatal C57BL/6 mice. ... Peripheral lung tissue without the trachea and bronchi was mechanically dissociated with scalpels and digested by a solution of 2 mg/ml collagenase A, 2 mg/ml trypsin, and 50 μg/ml gentamicin

incorrect.source_says: 37°C (stated explicitly; the cited evidence quote itself contains 37°C yet the field is null)
incorrect.evidence_quote: The flasks were incubated in a humidified atmosphere at 37°C and 5% CO 2

incorrect.source_says: Lungospheres were enzymatically dissociated to single cells using TrypLE Express; 'mechanical dissociation' (scalpels) applied only to the initial primary tissue, not to passaging of spheres/organoids
incorrect.evidence_quote: The lungospheres were washed with DMEM/F-12 and resuspended in TrypLE™ Express (Gibco). After incubation for 5-10 min at 37°C, the lungospheres were gently pipetted to generate single-cell suspensions.
incorrect.source_loc: methods_text :: Airway epithelium-like structures at the air-liquid interface (ALI)

incorrect.source_says: DMEM/F-12 is the lungosphere base medium, but the downstream ALI and 3D organoid stages use PneumaCult-Ex Plus and PneumaCult-ALI as base media; extraction reports only the lungosphere base and omits the protocol's organoid/ALI base media
incorrect.evidence_quote: resuspended in PneumaCult™-Ex Plus Medium (STEMCELL) supplemented with 20 ng/ml mEGF ... adding only 1 ml of PneumaCult™-ALI Medium (STEMCELL) (supplemented with 20 ng/ml mEGF)

incorrect.evidence_quote: The digestion was stopped by the addition of 10% (v/v) fetal bovine serum (Gibco).

incorrect.evidence_quote: lungosphere medium [1×B-27, 100 U/ml penicillin, 100 μg/ml streptomycin (Gibco), 4 μg/ml heparin (STEMCELL)

recall_misses.evidence_quote: resuspended in PneumaCult™-Ex Plus Medium (STEMCELL) supplemented with 20 ng/ml mEGF. ... fresh culturing medium changes were performed on both sides of the inserts every 2 days using PneumaCult™-Ex Plus Medium.

recall_misses.evidence_quote: adding only 1 ml of PneumaCult™-ALI Medium (STEMCELL) (supplemented with 20 ng/ml mEGF) to the basal compartment ... PneumaCult™-ALI Medium supplemented with 20 ng/ml mEGF was added to each well.

recall_misses.item: Cell seeding densities omitted: lungosphere 1.0×10^6 cells/ml; ALI Transwell 1.0×10^5 cells/insert in 0.5 ml apical, 1 ml basal

recall_misses.evidence_quote: in DMEM/F-12] (1.0×10 6 cells/ml). ... Transwell inserts (Corning) were seeded with 1.0×10 5 cells in 0.5 ml medium per insert (apical chamber), and 1 ml medium was added to one well of the 12-well plate (basal chamber).

recall_misses.item: Tissue dissociation enzymes omitted (collagenase A 2 mg/ml, trypsin 2 mg/ml, gentamicin 50 μg/ml, DNase I 20 U/ml) used to liberate primary LSPCs

recall_misses.evidence_quote: digested by a solution of 2 mg/ml collagenase A, 2 mg/ml trypsin, and 50 μg/ml gentamicin (Sigma) in DMEM/F-12 (Gibco) for 45 min at 37°C ... resuspended in 20 U/ml DNase I (Sigma)

recall_misses.item: Treatment/exposure agents omitted: crystalline silica (50 μg/cm2, applied apically in ALI / mixed into Matrigel) and NLRP3 inhibitor MCC950 (10 mM stock, added 30 min pre-silica) define the experimental conditions
recall_misses.source_says: Silica and MCC950 are the central perturbations of the model
recall_misses.evidence_quote: After stimulation with 50 μg/cm 2 silica for 28 days ... The NLRP3 inflammasome selective inhibitor MCC950 ... 10 mM stock solution. MCC950 was added 30 min prior to silica stimulation.

notes: Source is a mouse LSPC-derived lung organotypic model (2D ALI + 3D Matrigel organoid). No tables in bundle (tables=[]), no figure images on disk, supplementary_text is only video/figure-legend placeholders, so adjudication rests on methods_text (which is complete and authoritative); multimodal=false. CORRECTNESS: species=mouse, matrix=Matrigel, lungosphere base media=DMEM/F-12, CO2=5%, and the three signaling factors (mEGF 20 ng/ml, mFGF2 10 ng/ml, Y-27632 10 μM) are all verbatim-correct with no fabricated values — all evidence quotes check out exactly. Errors: (1) cell_type 'adult_stem_cell' is wrong — cells are neonatal-mouse primary lung stem/progenitor cells (primary tissue / progenitor), not adult; (2) temperature_c left null despite 37°C being inside the extraction's own evidence quote; (3) FBS mislabeled as a media supplement when it only quenched the digestion (cross-step contamination of the supplement list); (4) passaging 'mechanical dissociation' conflates initial scalpel tissue prep with the actual TrypLE-Express enzymatic sphere dissociation. The dominant problem is RECALL: the two STEMCELL PneumaCult media (Ex Plus and ALI) that define the ALI and 3D organoid stages are entirely missing; every supplement concentration (1× B-27, pen 100 U/ml, strep 100 μg/ml, heparin 4 μg/ml) is null though stated verbatim; timeline (28-day ALI, medium cadences) is empty; seeding densities, dissociation enzymes, GFR-Matrigel dome format, and the silica/MCC950 perturbations are all absent. Verdict partial: extracted items are largely accurate but the protocol is substantially under-captured, especially the ALI/3D media and all concentrations.
